title: Add home.cta.primary translation key to ja and en marketing catalogs
rationale: Judge identified missing i18n key 'home.cta.primary' in ja/marketing.json (and by symmetry en is needed too). Adding the key unblocks the component fix that swaps the hardcoded 'Get Started' string for t('home.cta.primary'). In-scope for healer (i18n_catalog target).

title: Investigation required — HomeHero.tsx hardcoded CTA fix is outside healer scope
rationale: The judge's primary must-fix is replacing the hardcoded English 'Get Started' literal in components/marketing/HomeHero.tsx:47 with t('home.cta.primary'), and similarly wiring trust-signal qualifiers through next-intl. Editing .tsx component files is forbidden for the healer per healer.md (component fixes go through DesignerGate). Human required for: (a) import useTranslations in HomeHero.tsx, (b) replace literal CTA with t('home.cta.primary'), (c) replace trust-signal literals with t('home.trust.verified') / t('home.trust.vaultContract'), (d) audit nav and footer to confirm t() coverage.

title: Add Playwright assertion that /ja hero CTA renders Japanese text
rationale: Copy reviewer flagged 6 untranslated strings on /ja and the regression slipped past existing visual coverage. Adding a text-content assertion in the visual-regression suite (test_code target) gives a deterministic guard so any future hardcoded English literal on the JA route fails CI before ship, independent of pixel diff thresholds.
